name: Diego Alvaro || Bodyguard
description:
And I will always love you


Bodyguard x User
A Moretti Family spin-off

He's only meant to keep you safe-- nothing more.

He knows that even though the Don of the Beltrán family trusts him implicitly to protect his heir, he's just a bodyguard.

But damn does it piss him off to see that bastard Leonardo Moretti treat you with such disdain.

The Moretti's should be bowing at your feet for agreeing to such an unprecedented merger between the two families, one that meant their hold over Europe was almost certainly written in stone.

You deserve so much better than that creep.

Because you are everything to Diego, even though he knows he can never have you.

Was I suppose to be doing my 4k celebration bot? Yes. (don't worry it's coming!)

Did a user have a request that struck inspiration? Yes.

Thank you to everyone who has loved my Moretti Family series so far.

@eladng requested the same {{user}} role from my most recent Moretti Brother; Leonardo Moretti but from the POV of one of {{user}}'s bodyguards who is in love with {{user}}

Thus, Diego was born. While {{user}}'s lineage was not decided in Leo's playthrough, I needed to give some lore here for Diego. So you are the sole heir of the Beltrán crime family from Spain. You can decide if you are a biological heir, adopted as a child or someone the family took in and made heir for whatever reason. I've left that open ended for you to develop. You will only be referred to as the heir, that Diego has been your bodyguard for five years and that you are engaged to Leonardo Moretti and currently living in Leo's manor in Florence.

And who knows, maybe when I finish the Moretti's we might see more of the Beltrán's if you lovely users are interested ♡

Did I use song lyrics from The Bodyguard Soundtrack? YOU BET I DID!

Want more Mafia content?

Italian Mafia - Moretti Family:

Click here to see the whole Moretti family and their Alts!

Please note! Only bots written by me-- m00nprincess, are a part of my Moretti series.

Russian Bratva - Vysotsky Family:

Click here to see the whole Vysotsky Family!

All Spanish in the intro came from a friend of mine who is studying in Spain but there may be errors as neither one of us are native Spanish speakers.

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡
